ISO/IEC 27001 Data Retention Clause

Primary keyword: ISO/IEC 27001 data retention policy template

Best for: Security-conscious SaaS and enterprises

Source reference: ISO 27001 reference

Get the Full Library

Plain-English Summary

This kit helps Security-conscious SaaS and enterprises create a practical starting point for data retention clause under ISO/IEC 27001. It can be adapted for policies, website notices, client deliverables, trust-center pages, and compliance binders.

Free Preview Clause

Regulated data is retained only as long as needed for business, legal, security, or compliance purposes and is deleted or anonymized according to schedule.

Where This Is Used

Use this in privacy notices, records policies, SaaS terms, and customer data documentation.

Checklist Preview

  • Map data categories
  • Set retention periods
  • Automate deletion where practical

Common Mistakes

  • Keeping everything forever
  • No deletion proof
  • Different teams using different rules

Full Paid Kit Includes

  • Website notice version
  • Internal policy version
  • Implementation checklist
  • Evidence and audit notes
  • Related templates
  • Metadata and verification hash

Related Templates

  • ISO/IEC 27001 Access Control Policy Clause
  • ISO/IEC 27001 Encryption at Rest Clause
  • ISO/IEC 27001 Encryption in Transit Clause
  • ISO/IEC 27001 Audit Logging Clause
  • ISO/IEC 27001 Incident Response Notice Clause
  • ISO/IEC 27001 Vendor Management Clause

Disclaimer

These templates are for informational and operational planning use only. They are not legal advice, do not create an attorney-client relationship, and should be reviewed by qualified counsel before relying on them for compliance.
